channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Hillary Clinton, George Soros and Denzel Washington will receive the highest US civilian honor
item.description: Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton, Democratic philanthropist George Soros and actor-director Denzel Washington are set to be awarded the nation’s highest civilian honor.
item.dc:creator: Fatima Hussein, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Here's Kelce! Retired Eagles great Jason Kelce's tries hand as late night television show host
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Jason Kelce chatted with the Linc — yes, the concrete and steel of the Philadelphia Eagles home stadium answered him with a pep talk — before the retired All-Pro lineman toured the city in his Eagles helmet car all while dressed in his Super Bowl parade Mummer’s costume.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Clippers' Kawhi Leonard upgraded to questionable, could make season debut Saturday against Atlanta
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Kawhi Leonard evidently is ready to play basketball again. The Los Angeles Clippers upgraded Leonard from out to questionable on their injury report Friday night, indicating that he may make his season debut Saturday when the team plays host to the Atlanta Hawks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Minnesota beats Virginia Tech 24-10 in Duke's Mayo Bowl for 8th straight bowl victory
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Moments before being doused with a five-gallon tub of mayonnaise, Minnesota coach P.J.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Victor Wembanyama after 100 games: Set to turn 21, his numbers are staggering
item.description: Victor Wembanyama's days as a 20-year-old in the NBA are over. He turns 21 on Saturday. And on the final day before that birthday, Wembanyama hit another milestone — 100 NBA games.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Hideki Matsuyama sets the target at Kapalua and leads Collin Morikawa by 1
item.description: KAPALUA, Hawaii (AP) — Collin Morikawa has played Kapalua enough to know that trailing Hideki Matsuyama by seven shots early in the second round was no reason to panic. Sure enough, he nearly caught up to the Japanese star on Friday at The Sentry.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: After Astros talks with Bregman ‘stalled,’ 3 teams emerge as serious suitors
item.description: The Detroit Tigers, Boston Red Sox and Toronto Blue Jays have emerged as three suitors with a “very, very real” possibility of landing Gold Glove third baseman Alex Bregman, a league source told KPRC 2.
item.dc:creator: Ari Alexander, KPRC 2

item.title: College football turns upside down, but this final four is a collection of the sport's big programs
item.description: In the first round of the College Football Playoff, the teams seeded 5-8 all won. In the second round, they all won again.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Dodgers sign star out of Korean baseball league
item.description: If you thought the Los Angeles Dodgers would slow down on player signings because they already assembled a world champion roster, then you were wrong. According to the team on Friday, the Dodgers have added one of this offseason's most sought-after prizes: Korean star second baseman Hyeseong Kim.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: CFP semifinals by the numbers: All four teams are members of the exclusive 900-win club
item.description: The College Football Playoff expanded to 12 teams to get some new blood. The final four are decidedly blueblood. The semifinals match Penn State against Notre Dame at the Orange Bowl on Jan. 9 and Texas against Ohio State in the Cotton Bowl on Jan. 10.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alex Ovechkin scores on Marc-Andre Fleury for a 28th time to move 24 away from the NHL goals record
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Alex Ovechkin moved another step closer to breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL career goals record by tormenting Marc-Andre Fleury one more time.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles coach Nick Sirianni set to rest Saquon Barkley in finale and end chance at NFL rushing record
item.description: Saquon Barkley had a heart-to-heart talk with his dad that was more coated in heartbreak than hope over the Philadelphia Eagles running back's pursuit of the NFL single-season rushing record.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5
